title: Sunday Food Distribution
description: Join us for our weekly Sunday food distribution drive in Hauz Khas. We collect surplus food from local restaurants and distribute it to homeless families in the area.
meetingPoint: Hauz Khas Market, near main fountain

title: Night Distribution Drive
description: Night drive to distribute food to homeless individuals near Noida Sector 18. We meet at the metro station and then walk to identified spots.

title: Education Drive
description: Combine food distribution with teaching underprivileged children. We provide meals and basic education supplies.

title: Hospital Patient Support
description: Distributing food to patients' families outside AIIMS hospital. Many families wait for long hours and need food.

title: Old Age Home Visit
description: Visit to an old age home with food and companionship. We'll serve lunch and spend time with the elderly.

title: Railway Station Food Distribution
description: Large scale distribution at New Delhi Railway Station. We'll distribute food to homeless and migrant workers near the station.

title: Slum Area Drive
description: Drive in the slum clusters of Noida Sector 122. We'll distribute food packets and interact with children.

title: Weekend Mega Drive
description: Mega drive in DLF area. We'll collect surplus from multiple restaurants and distribute in nearby underprivileged communities.
